description: Inspired by the first flush of spring, the Reelive fragrance for women from reebok has minty and floral undertones - a water lily sprinkled with mint leaves. This eau de parfum, bottled in a delectable curved flask with a glass top, has base notes of vanilla, peppered by jasmine and nutmeg. Quantity: 100 ml Caution Flammable Keep away from sources of ignition Keep away from children Do not use near fire, flame or heat Avoid spraying near the eyes
